message:
fix(fsfs): eliminate checksum ambiguity in InteractionSnapshot::compute_checksum

Optional fields were not distinguished between None and Some, and
active_filters entries had no length delimiter, so different states
could produce identical checksums. Add tag bytes for Option fields
(0=None, 1=Some) and length-prefix each filter with a u32 count
header and per-entry u32 length.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
